rationale: Wrap the proof in `if (page_array fragment of the ensures antecedent)` so the two `forall|i| ... post_k.page_array@[i] =~= pre.page_array@[i]` conjuncts and the eight per-field equalities at `index` become hypotheses; then `assert forall|i: int| 0 <= i < NUM_PAGES implies post1.page_array@[i] =~= post2.page_array@[i]` with a case split on `i == index` (at index every Page field is pinned to pre's or to the shared `ref_count` parameter, off index the two foralls share the `pre.page_array@[i]` trigger and fire together), closing with Seq extensionality (`=~=`). Non-page_array ensures already equate each side to `pre_self_`, so they agree by transitivity once Verus discharges the implication.
